allow: PowerShell($env:PORT=3000; Start-Process -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","start" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Write-Output "server started")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output \("Inicio -> HTTP " + $r.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })
